evals.name: fresh-repo-no-memory
evals.prompt: I just cloned this widget-store repo and there's no agent memory file yet. Can you audit it and suggest what should go in one?
evals.expected_output: Discovery finds neither AGENTS.md nor CLAUDE.md; skill offers to scaffold AGENTS.md (not CLAUDE.md). Proposed content covers npm scripts and notes PORT env var.

assertions.text: Proposes scaffolding AGENTS.md (not CLAUDE.md) as the canonical filename
Mentions at least two real package.json scripts (dev/build/test/lint)
Does not invent commands not present in package.json
Outputs a discovery summary or quality report before proposing edits

evals.name: claude-md-only-migrate
evals.prompt: Check whether my CLAUDE.md is still accurate for this repo.
evals.expected_output: Discovery finds only CLAUDE.md. Skill audits it AND surfaces the AGENTS.md migration with BOTH options. User is asked which option to use.

assertions.text: Surfaces AGENTS.md migration option (skill does not silently leave the repo on CLAUDE.md)
Presents BOTH migration options: rename, and @AGENTS.md stub
Asks the user to choose between options rather than picking unilaterally

evals.name: agents-md-audit
evals.expected_output: Audits the AGENTS.md, prints a quality report before diffs, flags both stale entries, proposes targeted diffs against AGENTS.md.

assertions.text: Flags `npm run start` as stale (the script no longer exists in package.json)
Outputs a quality report (with scores or grade) before any proposed diffs
Proposed edits target AGENTS.md, not a new or separate CLAUDE.md
Does not fabricate commands or files not present in the fixture

evals.name: monorepo-mixed
evals.prompt: Look at the agent memory files across this monorepo and tell me what's off.
evals.expected_output: Discovers root AGENTS.md and packages/api/CLAUDE.md. Flags inconsistency and proposes unifying on AGENTS.md.

assertions.text: Flags the mixed-filename inconsistency in the same repo as a problem
Proposes migrating the api package's CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md
Presents both migration options (rename OR @AGENTS.md stub) and applies the choice consistently
Does not propose adding new memory files unrelated to the existing structure
